Our code, dataset, benchmark, and models are available at this https URL.
摘要：虽然人类天生具有不同的价值观，但目前的大语言模型(LLM)对齐方法往往假设将大语言模型与一般公众的偏好对齐是最优的。采用更加个性化的方法进行LLM比对的一个主要挑战是缺乏可扩展性，因为它涉及重复获取偏好数据并针对每个人的偏好训练新的奖励模型和LLM。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个新的范例，其中用户在系统消息中指定他们最看重的东西，指导LLM的生成行为更好地与用户的意图保持一致。然而，这种方法的幼稚应用不是微不足道的，因为LLM通常接受关于统一系统消息的培训(例如，“您是一个有用的助手”)，这限制了他们概括为不同的、看不见的系统消息的能力。为了改进这一泛化，我们创建了多方面集合，这是一个具有192k个值组合的首选项数据集，跨越65k个用户说明。使用这个数据集，我们训练了一个名为Janus的7B LLM，并通过添加反映用户偏好的各种看不见的系统消息，在来自5个基准测试(AlpacaEval 2.0、FlASK、Koala、MT-BENCH和Self-Indict)的921个提示上对它进行了测试。Janus在对阵米斯特拉尔7B指令v0.2、GPT-3.5 Turbo和GPT-4时的平局+胜率分别为75.2%、72.4%和66.4%。出人意料的是，在三个专注于响应帮助的基准测试(AlpacaEval 2.0，MT-BASE，Arena Hard Auto v0.1)上，Janus的表现也超过了Llama 38B指令+4.0%，+0.1%，+3.0%的利润率，强调了大量系统信息的培训也可以增强对普通公众偏好的一致性。我们的代码、数据集、基准测试和模型都可以在这个HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-37] Yuan 2.0-M32: Mixture of Experts with Attention Router
[NLP-37] 元2.0-M32：具有注意力的专家混合路由器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17976
作者: Shaohua Wu,Jiangang Luo,Xi Chen,Lingjun Li,Xudong Zhao,Tong Yu,Chao Wang,Yue Wang,Fei Wang,Weixu Qiao,Houbo He,Zeru Zhang,Zeyu Sun,Junxiong Mao,Chong Shen
关键词: similar base architecture, base architecture, similar base, router network, classical router network
中文关键词: 相似基础架构、基础架构、相似基础、路由器网络、经典路由器网络
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 14 pages,3 figures, 7 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Yuan 2.0-M32, with a similar base architecture as Yuan-2.0 2B, uses a mixture-of-experts architecture with 32 experts of which 2 experts are active. A new router network, Attention Router, is proposed and adopted for a more efficient selection of experts, which boosts the accuracy of 3.8% compared to the model with classical router network. Yuan 2.0-M32 is trained with 2000B tokens from scratch, and the training computation consumption is only 9.25% of a dense model at the same parameter scale. Yuan 2.0-M32 demonstrates competitive capability on coding, math, and various domains of expertise, with only 3.7B active parameters of 40B in total, and 7.4 GFlops forward computation per token, both of which are only 1/19 of Llama3-70B. Yuan 2.0-M32 surpass Llama3-70B on MATH and ARC-Challenge benchmark, with accuracy of 55.89 and 95.8 respectively. The models and source codes of Yuan 2.0-M32 are released at Github.
摘要：元2.0-M32具有与元2.0 2B类似的基础架构，采用混合专家架构，有32名专家，其中2名专家处于活跃状态。提出并采用了一种新的路由器网络Attention Router，以更有效地选择专家，与经典路由器网络的模型相比，准确率提高了3.8%。元2.0-M32从头开始使用2000 B代币进行训练，相同参数规模下训练计算消耗仅为密集模型的9.25%。元2.0-M32在编码、数学和各个专业领域展现出竞争力，总共40 B的活动参数仅为3.7B，每个代币的前向计算量为7.4 GFlops，两者均仅为Llama 3 - 70 B的1/19。元2.0-M32在MATH和AR-Challenge基准上超越Llama 3 - 70 B，准确率分别为55.89和95.8。元2.0-M32的模型和源代码已在Github上发布。

[NLP-38] Recent Trends in Personalized Dialogue Generation: A Review of Datasets Methodologies and Evaluations
[NLP-38] 个性化对话生成的最新趋势：数据集方法论和评估回顾

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17974
作者: Yi-Pei Chen,Noriki Nishida,Hideki Nakayama,Yuji Matsumoto
关键词: Enhancing user engagement, generate fluent responses, Personalized dialogue generation, large language models, Enhancing user
中文关键词: 增强用户参与度，生成流畅的响应，个性化对话生成，大型语言模型，增强用户
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Presented in LREC-COLING 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Enhancing user engagement through personalization in conversational agents has gained significance, especially with the advent of large language models that generate fluent responses. Personalized dialogue generation, however, is multifaceted and varies in its definition – ranging from instilling a persona in the agent to capturing users’ explicit and implicit cues. This paper seeks to systemically survey the recent landscape of personalized dialogue generation, including the datasets employed, methodologies developed, and evaluation metrics applied. Covering 22 datasets, we highlight benchmark datasets and newer ones enriched with additional features. We further analyze 17 seminal works from top conferences between 2021-2023 and identify five distinct types of problems. We also shed light on recent progress by LLMs in personalized dialogue generation. Our evaluation section offers a comprehensive summary of assessment facets and metrics utilized in these works. In conclusion, we discuss prevailing challenges and envision prospect directions for future research in personalized dialogue generation.
摘要：在会话代理中通过个性化来增强用户参与度已经变得非常重要，特别是随着能够产生流畅响应的大型语言模型的出现。然而，个性化对话生成是多方面的，其定义也不同–从向代理中灌输角色到捕获用户的显性和隐性暗示。本文试图系统地调查个性化对话生成的最新情况，包括所使用的数据集、开发的方法和应用的评估指标。涵盖22个数据集，我们重点介绍基准数据集和更新的具有更多功能的数据集。我们进一步分析了2021-2023年间顶级会议的17部开创性作品，并确定了五种不同类型的问题。我们还说明了LLMS在个性化对话生成方面的最新进展。我们的评估部分提供了这些工作中使用的评估方面和衡量标准的全面总结。最后，我们讨论了个性化对话生成面临的挑战，并展望了未来个性化对话生成研究的方向。

[NLP-39] Knowledge Circuits in Pretrained Transformers
[NLP-39] 预训练变形金刚中的知识回路

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17969
作者: Yunzhi Yao,Ningyu Zhang,Zekun Xi,Mengru Wang,Ziwen Xu,Shumin Deng,Huajun Chen
关键词: modern large language, large language models, engage in reasoning, knowledge, Multilayer Perceptrons
中文关键词: 现代大型语言、大型语言模型、从事推理、知识、多层感知器
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: Work in progress, 25 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The remarkable capabilities of modern large language models are rooted in their vast repositories of knowledge encoded within their parameters, enabling them to perceive the world and engage in reasoning. The inner workings of how these models store knowledge have long been a subject of intense interest and investigation among researchers. To date, most studies have concentrated on isolated components within these models, such as the Multilayer Perceptrons and attention head. In this paper, we delve into the computation graph of the language model to uncover the knowledge circuits that are instrumental in articulating specific knowledge. The experiments, conducted with GPT2 and TinyLLAMA, has allowed us to observe how certain information heads, relation heads, and Multilayer Perceptrons collaboratively encode knowledge within the model. Moreover, we evaluate the impact of current knowledge editing techniques on these knowledge circuits, providing deeper insights into the functioning and constraints of these editing methodologies. Finally, we utilize knowledge circuits to analyze and interpret language model behaviors such as hallucinations and in-context learning. We believe the knowledge circuit holds potential for advancing our understanding of Transformers and guiding the improved design of knowledge editing. Code and data are available in this https URL.
摘要：现代大型语言模型的非凡能力植根于它们庞大的知识库，这些知识被编码在它们的参数中，使它们能够感知世界并进行推理。长期以来，这些模型如何存储知识的内部工作原理一直是研究人员强烈感兴趣和研究的主题。到目前为止，大多数研究都集中在这些模型中的孤立组件上，如多层感知器和注意头部。在本文中，我们深入研究语言模型的计算图，以揭示有助于表达特定知识的知识回路。使用GPT2和TinyLLAMA进行的实验使我们能够观察到某些信息头、关系头和多层感知器如何在模型中协作编码知识。此外，我们评估了当前知识编辑技术对这些知识回路的影响，提供了对这些编辑方法的功能和限制的更深层次的见解。最后，我们利用知识回路来分析和解释语言模型行为，如幻觉和情景学习。我们相信，知识回路具有促进我们对变形金刚的理解和指导知识编辑的改进设计的潜力。代码和数据可在此HTTPS URL中找到。

[NLP-40] ransformer and Hybrid Deep Learning Based Models for Machine-Generated Text Detection
[NLP-40] 用于机器生成文本检测的基于转换器和混合深度学习的模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17964
作者: Teodor-George Marchitan,Claudiu Creanga,Liviu P. Dinu
关键词: Multilingual Black-Box Machine-Generated, Machine-Generated Text Detection, Multilingual Black-Box, Text Detection, NLP team
中文关键词: 多语言黑匣子机器生成、机器生成文本检测、多语言黑匣子、文本检测、NLP团队
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper describes the approach of the UniBuc - NLP team in tackling the SemEval 2024 Task 8: Multigenerator, Multidomain, and Multilingual Black-Box Machine-Generated Text Detection. We explored transformer-based and hybrid deep learning architectures. For subtask B, our transformer-based model achieved a strong \textbfsecond-place out of 77 teams with an accuracy of \textbf86.95%, demonstrating the architecture’s suitability for this task. However, our models showed overfitting in subtask A which could potentially be fixed with less fine-tunning and increasing maximum sequence length. For subtask C (token-level classification), our hybrid model overfit during training, hindering its ability to detect transitions between human and machine-generated text.
摘要：本文描述了UniBuc-NLP团队处理SemEval 2024任务8的方法：多生成器、多域和多语言黑匣子机器生成文本检测。我们探索了基于转换器的混合深度学习架构。对于子任务B，我们的基于转换器的模型在77个团队中获得了强\textbf第二名，准确率为\textbf86.95%，证明了该架构适合此任务。然而，我们的模型在子任务A中表现出过度匹配，这可能会通过减少微调和增加最大序列长度来修复。对于子任务C（标记级分类），我们的混合模型在训练期间过度适应，阻碍了其检测人类和机器生成文本之间转换的能力。

[NLP-41] Modeling Dynamic Topics in Chain-Free Fashion by Evolution-Tracking Contrastive Learning and Unassociated Word Exclusion
[NLP-41] 通过进化跟踪对比学习和无关联词排除在无链时尚中建模动态主题

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17957
作者: Xiaobao Wu,Xinshuai Dong,Liangming Pan,Thong Nguyen,Anh Tuan Luu
关键词: sequential documents, opinion mining, trend analysis, analysis and opinion, Dynamic topic models
中文关键词: 顺序文档、意见挖掘、趋势分析、分析和意见、动态主题模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Accepted to ACL 2024 Findings

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Dynamic topic models track the evolution of topics in sequential documents, which have derived various applications like trend analysis and opinion mining. However, existing models suffer from repetitive topic and unassociated topic issues, failing to reveal the evolution and hindering further applications. To address these issues, we break the tradition of simply chaining topics in existing work and propose a novel neural \modelfullname. We introduce a new evolution-tracking contrastive learning method that builds the similarity relations among dynamic topics. This not only tracks topic evolution but also maintains topic diversity, mitigating the repetitive topic issue. To avoid unassociated topics, we further present an unassociated word exclusion method that consistently excludes unassociated words from discovered topics. Extensive experiments demonstrate our model significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, tracking topic evolution with high-quality topics, showing better performance on downstream tasks, and remaining robust to the hyperparameter for evolution intensities. Our code is available at this https URL .
摘要：动态主题模型跟踪序列文档中主题的演变，已经衍生出趋势分析和观点挖掘等各种应用。然而，现有的模型存在主题重复和主题无关的问题，不能揭示演化过程，阻碍了进一步的应用。为了解决这些问题，我们打破了现有工作中简单链接主题的传统，提出了一个新颖的神经模型名称。我们引入了一种新的进化跟踪对比学习方法，该方法建立了动态主题之间的相似关系。这不仅跟踪主题的演变，而且保持了主题的多样性，减轻了重复的主题问题。为了避免无关联主题，我们进一步提出了一种无关联单词排除方法，该方法从发现的主题中一致地排除无关联单词。大量实验表明，我们的模型显著优于最先进的基线，用高质量的主题跟踪主题演变，在下游任务上表现出更好的性能，并对进化强度的超参数保持稳健。我们的代码可以在这个HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-42] ool Learning with Large Language Models: A Survey
[NLP-42] 使用大型语言模型学习：调查

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17935
作者: Changle Qu,Sunhao Dai,Xiaochi Wei,Hengyi Cai,Shuaiqiang Wang,Dawei Yin,Jun Xu,Ji-Rong Wen
关键词: large language models, highly complex problems, tackle highly complex, tool learning, tool
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，高度复杂的问题，解决高度复杂的问题，工具学习，工具
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recently, tool learning with large language models (LLMs) has emerged as a promising paradigm for augmenting the capabilities of LLMs to tackle highly complex problems. Despite growing attention and rapid advancements in this field, the existing literature remains fragmented and lacks systematic organization, posing barriers to entry for newcomers. This gap motivates us to conduct a comprehensive survey of existing works on tool learning with LLMs. In this survey, we focus on reviewing existing literature from the two primary aspects (1) why tool learning is beneficial and (2) how tool learning is implemented, enabling a comprehensive understanding of tool learning with LLMs. We first explore the “why” by reviewing both the benefits of tool integration and the inherent benefits of the tool learning paradigm from six specific aspects. In terms of “how”, we systematically review the literature according to a taxonomy of four key stages in the tool learning workflow: task planning, tool selection, tool calling, and response generation. Additionally, we provide a detailed summary of existing benchmarks and evaluation methods, categorizing them according to their relevance to different stages. Finally, we discuss current challenges and outline potential future directions, aiming to inspire both researchers and industrial developers to further explore this emerging and promising area.
摘要：最近，基于大语言模型的工具学习(LLMS)已成为增强LLMS处理高度复杂问题能力的一种很有前途的范例。尽管这一领域的关注度越来越高，进展迅速，但现有的文献仍然支离破碎，缺乏系统的组织，给新手带来了进入的障碍。这一差距促使我们对现有的使用LLMS进行工具学习的工作进行全面调查。在本次调查中，我们重点从两个主要方面回顾了现有文献：(1)为什么工具学习是有益的；(2)工具学习是如何实施的，从而使我们能够全面了解使用LLMS进行工具学习的情况。我们首先从六个具体方面回顾了工具整合的好处和工具学习范式的内在好处，从而探索了为什么。在“如何”方面，我们按照工具学习工作流程中四个关键阶段的分类系统地回顾了文献：任务计划、工具选择、工具调用和响应生成。此外，我们还提供了现有基准和评价方法的详细摘要，并根据它们与不同阶段的相关性进行了分类。最后，我们讨论了当前的挑战并勾勒出潜在的未来方向，旨在激励研究人员和工业开发商进一步探索这一新兴和有前途的领域。

[NLP-43] Online Merging Optimizers for Boosting Rewards and Mitigating Tax in Alignment
[NLP-43] 在线合并优化器，以提高奖励和减税

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17931
作者: Keming Lu,Bowen Yu,Fei Huang,Yang Fan,Runji Lin,Chang Zhou
关键词: aligning Large Language, Large Language Models, Effectively aligning Large, Supervised Fine-tuning, Large Language
中文关键词: 调整大型语言、大型语言模型、有效调整大型、监督微调、大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Effectively aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with human-centric values while preventing the degradation of abilities acquired through Pre-training and Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) poses a central challenge in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). In this paper, we first discover that interpolating RLHF and SFT model parameters can adjust the trade-off between human preference and basic capabilities, thereby reducing the alignment tax at the cost of alignment reward. Inspired by this, we propose integrating the RL policy and SFT models at each optimization step in RLHF to continuously regulate the training direction, introducing the Online Merging Optimizer. Specifically, we merge gradients with the parameter differences between SFT and pretrained models, effectively steering the gradient towards maximizing rewards in the direction of SFT optimization. We demonstrate that our optimizer works well with different LLM families, such as Qwen and LLaMA, across various model sizes ranging from 1.8B to 8B, various RLHF algorithms like DPO and KTO, and existing model merging methods. It significantly enhances alignment reward while mitigating alignment tax, achieving higher overall performance across 14 benchmarks.
摘要：有效地将大型语言模型(LLM)与以人为中心的价值观保持一致，同时防止通过预训练和有监督的微调(SFT)获得的能力退化，是人类反馈强化学习(RLHF)的核心挑战。在本文中，我们首先发现，内插RLHF和SFT模型参数可以调整人类偏好和基本能力之间的权衡，从而以牺牲配对奖励为代价来降低配对税。受此启发，我们提出在RLHF的每个优化步骤中集成RL策略和SFT模型，以不断调整训练方向，引入在线合并优化器。具体地说，我们将梯度与SFT和预训练模型之间的参数差异合并，有效地将梯度引导到SFT优化方向的最大化回报。我们展示了我们的优化器在不同的LLM家族，如Qwen和Llama，在从1.8B到8B的各种模型大小，各种RLHF算法，如DPO和KTO，以及现有的模型合并方法上都能很好地工作。它显著增强了对齐奖励，同时降低了对齐税，在14个基准中实现了更高的整体性能。

[NLP-44] he Evolution of Multimodal Model Architectures
[NLP-44] 多模式模型架构的演变

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17927
作者: Shakti N. Wadekar,Abhishek Chaurasia,Aman Chadha,Eugenio Culurciello
关键词: contemporary multimodal landscape, multimodal, model architectural patterns, prevalent multimodal model, characterizes four prevalent
中文关键词: 当代多模式景观、多模式、模型建筑模式、流行的多模式、四种流行的特征
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: 30 pages, 6 tables, 7 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This work uniquely identifies and characterizes four prevalent multimodal model architectural patterns in the contemporary multimodal landscape. Systematically categorizing models by architecture type facilitates monitoring of developments in the multimodal domain. Distinct from recent survey papers that present general information on multimodal architectures, this research conducts a comprehensive exploration of architectural details and identifies four specific architectural types. The types are distinguished by their respective methodologies for integrating multimodal inputs into the deep neural network model. The first two types (Type A and B) deeply fuses multimodal inputs within the internal layers of the model, whereas the following two types (Type C and D) facilitate early fusion at the input stage. Type-A employs standard cross-attention, whereas Type-B utilizes custom-designed layers for modality fusion within the internal layers. On the other hand, Type-C utilizes modality-specific encoders, while Type-D leverages tokenizers to process the modalities at the model’s input stage. The identified architecture types aid the monitoring of any-to-any multimodal model development. Notably, Type-C and Type-D are currently favored in the construction of any-to-any multimodal models. Type-C, distinguished by its non-tokenizing multimodal model architecture, is emerging as a viable alternative to Type-D, which utilizes input-tokenizing techniques. To assist in model selection, this work highlights the advantages and disadvantages of each architecture type based on data and compute requirements, architecture complexity, scalability, simplification of adding modalities, training objectives, and any-to-any multimodal generation capability.
摘要：这项工作独特地识别和表征了当代多式联运景观中流行的四种多式联运模式建筑模式。按架构类型系统地对模型进行分类有助于监控多通道领域的发展。不同于最近关于多模式建筑的一般信息的调查论文，本研究对建筑细节进行了全面的探索，并确定了四种特定的建筑类型。通过将多模式输入集成到深度神经网络模型中的各自方法来区分这些类型。前两种类型(类型A和B)在模型的内层深度融合多模式输入，而随后的两种类型(类型C和D)促进在输入阶段的早期融合。A类使用标准的交叉注意，而B类使用定制设计的层在内部层内进行通道融合。另一方面，类型C利用特定于通道的编码器，而类型D利用标记器在模型的输入阶段处理通道。确定的体系结构类型有助于监控任意对任意多模式模型的开发。值得注意的是，C型和D型目前在任意对任意多模式的构建中受到青睐。C类以其非标记化多模式模型体系结构而闻名，它正在成为利用输入标记化技术的D类的一种可行的替代方案。为了帮助选择模型，本工作根据数据和计算需求、架构复杂性、可扩展性、添加通道的简化程度、培训目标以及任意对任意多通道生成能力，重点介绍了每种架构类型的优缺点。

[NLP-45] Long Context is Not Long at All: A Prospector of Long-Dependency Data for Large Language Models
[NLP-45] 长上下文根本不长：大型语言模型长依赖数据的探索者

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17915
作者: Longze Chen,Ziqiang Liu,Wanwei He,Yunshui Li,Run Luo,Min Yang
关键词: large language models, language models, important for large, large language, Long-context modeling
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，语言模型，对于大型语言很重要，长上下文建模
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 13 pages, 5 figures, ACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Long-context modeling capabilities are important for large language models (LLMs) in various applications. However, directly training LLMs with long context windows is insufficient to enhance this capability since some training samples do not exhibit strong semantic dependencies across long contexts. In this study, we propose a data mining framework \textbfProLong that can assign each training sample with a long dependency score, which can be used to rank and filter samples that are more advantageous for enhancing long-context modeling abilities in LLM training. Specifically, we first use delta perplexity scores to measure the \textitDependency Strength between text segments in a given document. Then we refine this metric based on the \textitDependency Distance of these segments to incorporate spatial relationships across long-contexts. Final results are calibrated with a \textitDependency Specificity metric to prevent trivial dependencies introduced by repetitive patterns. Moreover, a random sampling approach is proposed to optimize the computational efficiency of ProLong. Comprehensive experiments on multiple benchmarks indicate that ProLong effectively identifies documents that carry long dependencies and LLMs trained on these documents exhibit significantly enhanced long-context modeling capabilities.
摘要：长上下文建模能力对于各种应用中的大型语言模型(LLM)非常重要。然而，直接训练具有长上下文窗口的LLM不足以增强这一能力，因为一些训练样本在长上下文中不表现出强烈的语义依赖性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个数据挖掘框架\textbfProLong，它可以为每个训练样本分配一个长依赖分数，用于对更有利于提高LLM训练中长上下文建模能力的样本进行排序和筛选。具体地说，我们首先使用增量困惑分数来测量给定文档中的文本段之间的\textitDependency强度。然后，我们基于这些分段的\textitDependency距离来细化该度量，以合并跨长上下文的空间关系。最终结果是使用\textitDependency特定度量来校准的，以防止重复模式引入的琐碎依赖。此外，还提出了一种随机抽样的方法来优化延长的计算效率。在多个基准测试上的综合实验表明，Exlong有效地识别具有长依赖关系的文档，并且在这些文档上训练的LLM具有显着增强的长上下文建模能力。

[NLP-46] Boosting Protein Language Models with Negative Sample Mining
[NLP-46] 利用负样本挖掘提升蛋白质语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17902
作者: Yaoyao Xu,Xinjian Zhao,Xiaozhuang Song,Benyou Wang,Tianshu Yu
关键词: protein representation learning, boosting large language, representation learning, introduce a pioneering, pioneering methodology
中文关键词: 蛋白质表示学习，促进大型语言、表示学习，引入开创性的、开创性的方法
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 17 pages, 4 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We introduce a pioneering methodology for boosting large language models in the domain of protein representation learning. Our primary contribution lies in the refinement process for correlating the over-reliance on co-evolution knowledge, in a way that networks are trained to distill invaluable insights from negative samples, constituted by protein pairs sourced from disparate categories. By capitalizing on this novel approach, our technique steers the training of transformer-based models within the attention score space. This advanced strategy not only amplifies performance but also reflects the nuanced biological behaviors exhibited by proteins, offering aligned evidence with traditional biological mechanisms such as protein-protein interaction. We experimentally observed improved performance on various tasks over datasets, on top of several well-established large protein models. This innovative paradigm opens up promising horizons for further progress in the realms of protein research and computational biology.
摘要：我们介绍了一种开创性的方法，用于在蛋白质表示学习领域增强大型语言模型。我们的主要贡献在于改进过程，将过度依赖共同进化知识联系起来，通过训练网络从负样本中提取宝贵的见解，这些样本由来自不同类别的蛋白质对组成。通过利用这种新方法，我们的技术在注意力得分空间内指导基于变压器的模型的训练。这一先进的策略不仅放大了性能，还反映了蛋白质所表现出的微妙的生物行为，提供了与传统生物机制(如蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用)相一致的证据。我们在实验中观察到，在几个成熟的大型蛋白质模型的基础上，数据集在各种任务中的性能有所改善。这一创新范式为蛋白质研究和计算生物学领域的进一步发展开辟了前景。

[NLP-47] Enhancing Emotion Recognition in Conversation through Emotional Cross-Modal Fusion and Inter-class Contrastive Learning
[NLP-47] 通过情感跨模式融合和班级间对比学习增强对话中的情感识别

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17900
作者: Haoxiang Shi,Xulong Zhang,Ning Cheng,Yong Zhang,Jun Yu,Jing Xiao,Jianzong Wang
关键词: recognition in conversation, Previous ERC methods, ERC methods relied, Previous ERC, ERC
中文关键词: 对话中的识别，以前的ERC方法，所依赖的ERC方法，以前的ERC，ERC
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted by the 20th International Conference on Intelligent Computing (ICIC 2024)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The purpose of emotion recognition in conversation (ERC) is to identify the emotion category of an utterance based on contextual information. Previous ERC methods relied on simple connections for cross-modal fusion and ignored the information differences between modalities, resulting in the model being unable to focus on modality-specific emotional information. At the same time, the shared information between modalities was not processed to generate emotions. Information redundancy problem. To overcome these limitations, we propose a cross-modal fusion emotion prediction network based on vector connections. The network mainly includes two stages: the multi-modal feature fusion stage based on connection vectors and the emotion classification stage based on fused features. Furthermore, we design a supervised inter-class contrastive learning module based on emotion labels. Experimental results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed method, demonstrating excellent performance on the IEMOCAP and MELD datasets.
摘要：会话中情感识别的目的是根据语境信息识别话语中的情感类别。以前的ERC方法依赖于简单的连接进行跨通道融合，而忽略了通道之间的信息差异，导致模型无法关注通道特定的情绪信息。同时，不同通道之间共享的信息没有被处理来产生情绪。信息冗余问题。为了克服这些局限性，我们提出了一种基于向量连接的跨通道融合情感预测网络。该网络主要包括两个阶段：基于连接向量的多模式特征融合阶段和基于融合特征的情感分类阶段。此外，我们还设计了一个基于情感标签的有监督类间对比学习模块。实验结果证实了该方法的有效性，在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上表现出了良好的性能。

[NLP-48] Arithmetic Reasoning with LLM: Prolog Generation Permutation
[NLP-48] 使用LLM进行算术推理：Prolog生成排列

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17893
作者: Xiaocheng Yang,Bingsen Chen,Yik-Cheung Tam
关键词: Instructing large language, Chain of Thought, large language models, shown great success, Instructing large
中文关键词: 指导大型语言、思维链、大型语言模型、取得巨大成功、指导大型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 12 pages, 4 figures, accepted by NAACL 2024 Main Conference

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Instructing large language models (LLMs) to solve elementary school math problems has shown great success using Chain of Thought (CoT). However, the CoT approach relies on an LLM to generate a sequence of arithmetic calculations which can be prone to cascaded calculation errors. We hypothesize that an LLM should focus on extracting predicates and generating symbolic formulas from the math problem description so that the underlying calculation can be done via an external code interpreter. We investigate using LLM to generate Prolog programs to solve mathematical questions. Experimental results show that our Prolog-based arithmetic problem-solving outperforms CoT generation in the GSM8K benchmark across three distinct LLMs. In addition, given the insensitive ordering of predicates and symbolic formulas in Prolog, we propose to permute the ground truth predicates for more robust LLM training via data augmentation.
摘要：使用思维链（CoT）指导大型语言模型（LLM）解决小学数学问题已取得巨大成功。然而，CoT方法依赖于LLM来生成一系列算术计算，这可能容易出现级联计算错误。我们假设LLM应该专注于从数学问题描述中提取动词和生成符号公式，以便可以通过外部代码解释器完成底层计算。我们研究使用LLM生成Prolog程序来解决数学问题。实验结果表明，我们基于Prolog的算术问题求解在三种不同的LLM上优于GSM 8 K基准中的CoT生成。此外，鉴于Prolog中的断言和符号公式的顺序不敏感，我们建议通过数据增强置换地面真值断言，以进行更稳健的LLM训练。

[NLP-49] SLMRec: Empowering Small Language Models for Sequential Recommendation
[NLP-49] SL MRec：为顺序推荐提供支持的小型语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17890
作者: Wujiang Xu,Zujie Liang,Jiaojiao Han,Xuying Ning,Wenfang Lin,Linxun Chen,Feng Wei,Yongfeng Zhang
关键词: task involves predicting, sequential Recommendation, task involves, past interactions, involves predicting
中文关键词: 任务涉及预测，顺序推荐，任务涉及，过去的互动，涉及预测
类目: Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The sequential Recommendation (SR) task involves predicting the next item a user is likely to interact with, given their past interactions. The SR models examine the sequence of a user’s actions to discern more complex behavioral patterns and temporal dynamics. Recent research demonstrates the great impact of LLMs on sequential recommendation systems, either viewing sequential recommendation as language modeling or serving as the backbone for user representation. Although these methods deliver outstanding performance, there is scant evidence of the necessity of a large language model and how large the language model is needed, especially in the sequential recommendation scene. Meanwhile, due to the huge size of LLMs, it is inefficient and impractical to apply a LLM-based model in real-world platforms that often need to process billions of traffic logs daily. In this paper, we explore the influence of LLMs’ depth by conducting extensive experiments on large-scale industry datasets. Surprisingly, we discover that most intermediate layers of LLMs are redundant. Motivated by this insight, we empower small language models for SR, namely SLMRec, which adopt a simple yet effective knowledge distillation method. Moreover, SLMRec is orthogonal to other post-training efficiency techniques, such as quantization and pruning, so that they can be leveraged in combination. Comprehensive experimental results illustrate that the proposed SLMRec model attains the best performance using only 13% of the parameters found in LLM-based recommendation models, while simultaneously achieving up to 6.6x and 8.0x speedups in training and inference time costs, respectively.
摘要：序贯推荐(SR)任务包括根据用户过去的交互预测用户可能交互的下一项。SR模型检查用户的动作序列，以识别更复杂的行为模式和时间动态。最近的研究表明，LLMS对序列推荐系统产生了巨大的影响，要么将序列推荐视为语言建模，要么作为用户表示的骨干。尽管这些方法提供了出色的性能，但很少有证据表明大型语言模型的必要性以及需要多大的语言模型，特别是在顺序推荐场景中。同时，由于LLMS的巨大规模，将基于LLM的模型应用于经常需要每天处理数十亿流量日志的现实平台是低效和不切实际的。在本文中，我们通过在大规模的工业数据集上进行大量的实验来探索LLMS深度的影响。令人惊讶的是，我们发现LLM的大多数中间层都是冗余的。受此启发，我们为SR的小语言模型SLMRec提供了支持，该模型采用了一种简单而有效的知识提取方法。此外，SLMRec与其他训练后效率技术(如量化和剪枝)是正交的，因此它们可以组合使用。实验结果表明，提出的SLMRec模型仅使用LLM推荐模型13%的参数即可获得最好的性能，同时在训练和推理时间上分别获得6.6倍和8.0倍的加速比。

[NLP-50] Seeing the Image: Prioritizing Visual Correlation by Contrastive Alignment
[NLP-50] 查看图像：通过对比对齐优先考虑视觉相关性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17871
作者: Xin Xiao,Bohong Wu,Jiacong Wang,Chunyuan Li,Xun Zhou,Haoyuan Guo
关键词: Vision Language Models, Existing image-text modality, Vision Language, Existing image-text, image-text modality alignment
中文关键词: 视觉语言模型、现有图像-文本形态、视觉语言、现有图像-文本、图像-文本形态对齐
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Existing image-text modality alignment in Vision Language Models (VLMs) treats each text token equally in an autoregressive manner. Despite being simple and effective, this method results in sub-optimal cross-modal alignment by over-emphasizing the text tokens that are less correlated with or even contradictory with the input images. In this paper, we advocate for assigning distinct contributions for each text token based on its visual correlation. Specifically, we present by contrasting image inputs, the difference in prediction logits on each text token provides strong guidance of visual correlation. We therefore introduce Contrastive ALignment (CAL), a simple yet effective re-weighting strategy that prioritizes training visually correlated tokens. Our experimental results demonstrate that CAL consistently improves different types of VLMs across different resolutions and model sizes on various benchmark datasets. Importantly, our method incurs minimal additional computational overhead, rendering it highly efficient compared to alternative data scaling strategies. Codes are available at this https URL.
摘要：现有的视觉语言模型(VLMS)中的图文通道对齐以自回归的方式平等地对待每个文本表征。尽管这种方法简单而有效，但通过过度强调与输入图像相关性较小甚至相互矛盾的文本标记，导致了次优的跨模式对齐。在本文中，我们主张根据每个文本标记的视觉相关性为其分配不同的贡献。具体地说，我们通过对比图像输入，每个文本标记上的预测逻辑的差异提供了强烈的视觉相关性指导。因此，我们引入了对比对齐(CAL)，这是一种简单但有效的重新加权策略，它对训练视觉相关的标记进行优先排序。我们的实验结果表明，在不同的基准数据集上，CAL在不同的分辨率和模型大小上一致地改善了不同类型的VLM。重要的是，我们的方法产生的额外计算开销最小，与其他数据扩展策略相比，它具有很高的效率。代码可在此HTTPS URL中找到。

[NLP-51] I-LLM: Efficient Integer-Only Inference for Fully-Quantized Low-Bit Large Language Models
[NLP-51] I-LLM：全量化低位大型语言模型的高效纯整推理

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17849
作者: Xing Hu,Yuan Chen,Dawei Yang,Sifan Zhou,Zhihang Yuan,Jiangyong Yu,Chen Xu
关键词: large language models, Post-training quantization, language models, potent technique, technique to accelerate
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、训练后量化、语言模型、强大的技术、加速技术
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Post-training quantization (PTQ) serves as a potent technique to accelerate the inference of large language models (LLMs). Nonetheless, existing works still necessitate a considerable number of floating-point (FP) operations during inference, including additional quantization and de-quantization, as well as non-linear operators such as RMSNorm and Softmax. This limitation hinders the deployment of LLMs on the edge and cloud devices. In this paper, we identify the primary obstacle to integer-only quantization for LLMs lies in the large fluctuation of activations across channels and tokens in both linear and non-linear operations. To address this issue, we propose I-LLM, a novel integer-only fully-quantized PTQ framework tailored for LLMs. Specifically, (1) we develop Fully-Smooth Block-Reconstruction (FSBR) to aggressively smooth inter-channel variations of all activations and weights. (2) to alleviate degradation caused by inter-token variations, we introduce a novel approach called Dynamic Integer-only MatMul (DI-MatMul). This method enables dynamic quantization in full-integer matrix multiplication by dynamically quantizing the input and outputs with integer-only operations. (3) we design DI-ClippedSoftmax, DI-Exp, and DI-Normalization, which utilize bit shift to execute non-linear operators efficiently while maintaining accuracy. The experiment shows that our I-LLM achieves comparable accuracy to the FP baseline and outperforms non-integer quantization methods. For example, I-LLM can operate at W4A4 with negligible loss of accuracy. To our knowledge, we are the first to bridge the gap between integer-only quantization and LLMs. We’ve published our code on anonymous.4open.science, aiming to contribute to the advancement of this field.
摘要：训练后量化(PTQ)是加速大型语言模型(LLM)推理的有效方法。尽管如此，现有的工作仍然需要在推理过程中进行相当数量的浮点(FP)运算，包括额外的量化和反量化，以及RMSNorm和Softmax等非线性算子。这一限制阻碍了边缘设备和云设备上LLM的部署。在这篇文章中，我们确定了LLMS仅整数量化的主要障碍在于在线性和非线性操作中跨通道和令牌的激活的巨大波动。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了一种新的仅支持整数的全量化PTQ框架I-LLM。具体地说，(1)我们发展了完全平滑的块重建(FSBR)来积极地平滑所有激活和权重的通道间变化。(2)为了缓解令牌间变化造成的性能下降，我们提出了一种新的方法–仅限整数的动态MatMul(DI-MatMul)。该方法通过仅使用整数运算来动态量化输入和输出，从而在全整数矩阵乘法中实现动态量化。(3)设计了DI-ClipedSoftmax算法、DI-Exp算法和DI-归一化算法，在保证运算精度的前提下，利用位移位高效地执行非线性算子。实验表明，我们的I-LLM达到了与FP基线相当的精度，并且性能优于非整数量化方法。例如，I-LLM可以在W4A4上运行，而精度损失可以忽略不计。据我们所知，我们是第一个在仅整数量化和LLM之间架起桥梁的人。我们已经将我们的代码发布在匿名.4Open.Science上，旨在为这一领域的进步做出贡献。

[NLP-52] Benchmark Underestimates the Readiness of Multi-lingual Dialogue Agents
[NLP-52] 基准低估了多语言对话代理的准备程度

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17840
作者: Andrew H. Lee,Sina J. Semnani,Galo Castillo-López,Gäel de Chalendar,Monojit Choudhury,Ashna Dua,Kapil Rajesh Kavitha,Sungkyun Kim,Prashant Kodali,Ponnurangam Kumaraguru,Alexis Lombard,Mehrad Moradshahi,Gihyun Park,Nasredine Semmar,Jiwon Seo,Tianhao Shen,Manish Shrivastava,Deyi Xiong,Monica S. Lam
关键词: Creating multilingual task-oriented, training data acquisition, Creating multilingual, multilingual task-oriented dialogue, tackle multilingual TOD
中文关键词: 创建多语言任务导向，培训数据获取，创建多语言、多语言任务导向对话，解决多语言DOE
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Creating multilingual task-oriented dialogue (TOD) agents is challenging due to the high cost of training data acquisition. Following the research trend of improving training data efficiency, we show for the first time, that in-context learning is sufficient to tackle multilingual TOD. To handle the challenging dialogue state tracking (DST) subtask, we break it down to simpler steps that are more compatible with in-context learning where only a handful of few-shot examples are used. We test our approach on the multilingual TOD dataset X-RiSAWOZ, which has 12 domains in Chinese, English, French, Korean, Hindi, and code-mixed Hindi-English. Our turn-by-turn DST accuracy on the 6 languages range from 55.6% to 80.3%, seemingly worse than the SOTA results from fine-tuned models that achieve from 60.7% to 82.8%; our BLEU scores in the response generation (RG) subtask are also significantly lower than SOTA. However, after manual evaluation of the validation set, we find that by correcting gold label errors and improving dataset annotation schema, GPT-4 with our prompts can achieve (1) 89.6%-96.8% accuracy in DST, and (2) more than 99% correct response generation across different languages. This leads us to conclude that current automatic metrics heavily underestimate the effectiveness of in-context learning. Subjects: Computation and Language (cs.CL) Cite as: arXiv:2405.17840 [cs.CL] (or arXiv:2405.17840v1 [cs.CL] for this version)
摘要：由于训练数据获取的成本很高，创建多语言的任务导向对话(TOD)代理是具有挑战性的。遵循提高训练数据效率的研究趋势，我们首次表明，情境学习足以应对多语言TOD。为了处理具有挑战性的对话状态跟踪(DST)子任务，我们将其分解为更简单的步骤，这些步骤与仅使用少数几个简单示例的上下文学习更兼容。我们在多语言TOD数据集X-RiSAWOZ上测试了我们的方法，X-RiSAWOZ有12个领域，包括汉语、英语、法语、韩语、印地语和印地语-英语混合代码。我们在6种语言上逐轮测试的准确率在55.6%到80.3%之间，似乎比SOTA的微调模型的结果更差，后者的准确率在60.7%到82.8%之间；我们的BLEU在反应生成(RG)子任务中的得分也显著低于SOTA。然而，在对验证集进行人工评估后，我们发现，通过纠正Gold Label错误和改进数据集标注模式，GPT-4在我们的提示下可以达到(1)DST的89.6%-96.8%的准确率，(2)超过99%的跨语言正确答案生成。这导致我们得出结论，当前的自动指标严重低估了情景学习的有效性。科目：计算和语言(cs.CL)引用为：arxiv：2405.17840cs.CL

[NLP-53] More Than Catastrophic Forgetting: Integrating General Capabilities For Domain-Specific LLMs
[NLP-53] 不仅仅是灾难性的遗忘：集成特定领域LLM的通用能力

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17830
作者: Chengyuan Liu,Shihang Wang,Yangyang Kang,Lizhi Qing,Fubang Zhao,Changlong Sun,Kun Kuang,Fei Wu
关键词: Large Language Models, Language Models, Catastrophic Forgetting, Large Language, decreases after Large
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，语言模型，灾难性遗忘，大型语言，大型后减少
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The performance on general tasks decreases after Large Language Models (LLMs) are fine-tuned on domain-specific tasks, the phenomenon is known as Catastrophic Forgetting (CF). However, this paper presents a further challenge for real application of domain-specific LLMs beyond CF, called General Capabilities Integration (GCI), which necessitates the integration of both the general capabilities and domain knowledge within a single instance. The objective of GCI is not merely to retain previously acquired general capabilities alongside new domain knowledge, but to harmonize and utilize both sets of skills in a cohesive manner to enhance performance on domain-specific tasks. Taking legal domain as an example, we carefully design three groups of training and testing tasks without lacking practicability, and construct the corresponding datasets. To better incorporate general capabilities across domain-specific scenarios, we introduce ALoRA, which utilizes a multi-head attention module upon LoRA, facilitating direct information transfer from preceding tokens to the current one. This enhancement permits the representation to dynamically switch between domain-specific knowledge and general competencies according to the attention. Extensive experiments are conducted on the proposed tasks. The results exhibit the significance of our setting, and the effectiveness of our method.
摘要：大语言模型对特定领域任务进行微调后，在一般任务上的表现下降，这种现象被称为灾难性遗忘(CF)。然而，本文对领域特定的LLMS的实际应用提出了更多的挑战，称为通用能力集成(GCI)，它需要在单个实例中集成通用能力和领域知识。GCI的目标不仅是保留以前获得的一般能力和新的领域知识，而且以一种连贯的方式协调和利用这两套技能，以提高特定领域任务的绩效。以法律领域为例，在不缺乏实用性的前提下，精心设计了三组训练和测试任务，并构建了相应的数据集。为了更好地整合跨域特定场景的通用功能，我们引入了Alora，它利用了LORA上的多头注意力模块，促进了从之前的令牌到当前令牌的直接信息传输。这一增强允许表示根据关注度在特定领域知识和一般能力之间动态切换。对所提出的任务进行了广泛的实验。结果显示了我们设置的意义，以及我们方法的有效性。

[NLP-54] Conv-CoA: Improving Open-domain Question Answering in Large Language Models via Conversational Chain-of-Action
[NLP-54] Conv-CoA：通过对话行动链改进大型语言模型中的开放领域问题解答

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17822
作者: Zhenyu Pan,Haozheng Luo,Manling Li,Han Liu
关键词: Conversational Question Answering, Open-domain Conversational Question, Open-domain Conversational, Question Answering, conversational information retrieval
中文关键词: 对话式问题服务、开放领域对话式问题、开放领域对话式、问题服务、对话式信息检索
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We present a Conversational Chain-of-Action (Conv-CoA) framework for Open-domain Conversational Question Answering (OCQA). Compared with literature, Conv-CoA addresses three major challenges: (i) unfaithful hallucination that is inconsistent with real-time or domain facts, (ii) weak reasoning performance in conversational scenarios, and (iii) unsatisfying performance in conversational information retrieval. Our key contribution is a dynamic reasoning-retrieval mechanism that extracts the intent of the question and decomposes it into a reasoning chain to be solved via systematic prompting, pre-designed actions, updating the Contextual Knowledge Set (CKS), and a novel Hopfield-based retriever. Methodologically, we propose a resource-efficiency Hopfield retriever to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of conversational information retrieval within our actions. Additionally, we propose a conversational-multi-reference faith score (Conv-MRFS) to verify and resolve conflicts between retrieved knowledge and answers in conversations. Empirically, we conduct comparisons between our framework and 23 state-of-the-art methods across five different research directions and two public benchmarks. These comparisons demonstrate that our Conv-CoA outperforms other methods in both the accuracy and efficiency dimensions.
摘要：提出了一种用于开放领域会话问答(OCQA)的会话行为链(Conv-CoA)框架。与文献相比，Conv-CoA解决了三个主要挑战：(I)与实时或领域事实不一致的不忠实幻觉，(Ii)在会话场景中的弱推理性能，(Iii)在会话信息检索中的不令人满意的性能。我们的主要贡献是一种动态的推理-检索机制，该机制提取问题的意图并将其分解为一个推理链，通过系统的提示、预先设计的操作、更新上下文知识集(CKS)和基于Hopfield的新型检索器来解决。在方法上，我们提出了一种资源效率较高的Hopfield检索器，以提高我们行动中对话式信息检索的效率和准确性。此外，我们还提出了一种会话多参考信任分数(Conv-MRFS)来验证和解决会话中检索到的知识和答案之间的冲突。在实证方面，我们在五个不同的研究方向和两个公共基准上对我们的框架和23种最先进的方法进行了比较。这些比较表明，我们的Conv-CoA在精度和效率两个维度上都优于其他方法。

[NLP-55] ransVIP: Speech to Speech Translation System with Voice and Isochrony Preservation
[NLP-55] ransVIP：具有语音和等时性保留的语音到语音翻译系统

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17809
作者: Chenyang Le,Yao Qian,Dongmei Wang,Long Zhou,Shujie Liu,Xiaofei Wang,Midia Yousefi,Yanmin Qian,Jinyu Li,Sheng Zhao,Michael Zeng
关键词: directly translating speech, rising interest, interest and trend, trend in research, research towards directly
中文关键词: 直接翻译语音，兴趣的上升，兴趣和趋势，研究趋势，直接研究
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Sound (cs.SD); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: Work in progress

点击查看摘要

Abstract:There is a rising interest and trend in research towards directly translating speech from one language to another, known as end-to-end speech-to-speech translation. However, most end-to-end models struggle to outperform cascade models, i.e., a pipeline framework by concatenating speech recognition, machine translation and text-to-speech models. The primary challenges stem from the inherent complexities involved in direct translation tasks and the scarcity of data. In this study, we introduce a novel model framework TransVIP that leverages diverse datasets in a cascade fashion yet facilitates end-to-end inference through joint probability. Furthermore, we propose two separated encoders to preserve the speaker’s voice characteristics and isochrony from the source speech during the translation process, making it highly suitable for scenarios such as video dubbing. Our experiments on the French-English language pair demonstrate that our model outperforms the current state-of-the-art speech-to-speech translation model.
摘要：将语音从一种语言直接翻译成另一种语言，即端到端的语音到语音翻译，是近年来研究的热点和趋势。然而，大多数端到端模型难以超越级联模型，即通过串联语音识别、机器翻译和文本到语音模型的流水线框架。主要挑战来自直接翻译任务所涉及的固有复杂性和数据稀缺。在这项研究中，我们介绍了一个新的模型框架TransVIP，它以级联的方式利用不同的数据集，并通过联合概率促进端到端的推理。此外，我们提出了两个独立的编码器，在翻译过程中保持说话人的声音特征和与源语音的等时性，使其非常适合于视频配音等场景。我们在法语-英语语言对上的实验表明，我们的模型比目前最先进的语音到语音翻译模型性能更好。

[NLP-56] Detection-Correction Structure via General Language Model for Grammatical Error Correction
[NLP-56] 基于通用语言模型的语法错误检测-纠正结构

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17804
作者: Wei Li,Houfeng Wang
关键词: Grammatical error correction, Grammatical error, minimal edits, task dedicated, dedicated to rectifying
中文关键词: 语法错误纠正，语法错误，最少的编辑，专门的任务，致力于纠正
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Long paper. Accepted by ACL 2024 Main Conference

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Grammatical error correction (GEC) is a task dedicated to rectifying texts with minimal edits, which can be decoupled into two components: detection and correction. However, previous works have predominantly focused on direct correction, with no prior efforts to integrate both into a single model. Moreover, the exploration of the detection-correction paradigm by large language models (LLMs) remains underdeveloped. This paper introduces an integrated detection-correction structure, named DeCoGLM, based on the General Language Model (GLM). The detection phase employs a fault-tolerant detection template, while the correction phase leverages autoregressive mask infilling for localized error correction. Through the strategic organization of input tokens and modification of attention masks, we facilitate multi-task learning within a single model. Our model demonstrates competitive performance against the state-of-the-art models on English and Chinese GEC datasets. Further experiments present the effectiveness of the detection-correction structure in LLMs, suggesting a promising direction for GEC.
摘要：语法纠错(GEC)是一项致力于以最少的编辑来纠正文本的任务，可以将其分解为两个部分：检测和纠正。然而，以前的工作主要集中在直接修正上，没有先前的努力将两者整合到一个单一模型中。此外，利用大型语言模型对检测-校正范式的探索仍然不发达。本文介绍了一种基于通用语言模型(GLM)的一体化检测-校正结构DeCoGLM。检测阶段采用容错检测模板，而校正阶段利用自回归掩码填充进行局部纠错。通过输入标记的策略组织和注意掩码的修改，我们促进了单一模型中的多任务学习。我们的模型在英国和中国的GEC数据集上表现出了与最先进的模型相比具有竞争力的性能。进一步的实验证明了该检测-校正结构在低分辨激光雷达中的有效性，为GEC提供了一个很有前途的方向。

[NLP-57] Exploring Activation Patterns of Parameters in Language Models
[NLP-57] 探索语言模型中参数的激活模式

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17799
作者: Yudong Wang,Damai Dai,Zhifang Sui
关键词: treats large language, internal working mechanism, large language models, work treats large, working mechanism
中文关键词: 对待大语言、内部工作机制、大语言模型、工作对待大、工作机制
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Most work treats large language models as black boxes without in-depth understanding of their internal working mechanism. In order to explain the internal representations of LLMs, we propose a gradient-based metric to assess the activation level of model parameters. Based on this metric, we obtain three preliminary findings. (1) When the inputs are in the same domain, parameters in the shallow layers will be activated densely, which means a larger portion of parameters will have great impacts on the outputs. In contrast, parameters in the deep layers are activated sparsely. (2) When the inputs are across different domains, parameters in shallow layers exhibit higher similarity in the activation behavior than deep layers. (3) In deep layers, the similarity of the distributions of activated parameters is positively correlated to the empirical data relevance. Further, we develop three validation experiments to solidify these findings. (1) Firstly, starting from the first finding, we attempt to configure different prune ratios for different layers, and find this method can benefit model pruning. (2) Secondly, we find that a pruned model based on one calibration set can better handle tasks related to the calibration task than those not related, which validate the second finding. (3) Thirdly, Based on the STS-B and SICK benchmark, we find that two sentences with consistent semantics tend to share similar parameter activation patterns in deep layers, which aligns with our third finding. Our work sheds light on the behavior of parameter activation in LLMs, and we hope these findings will have the potential to inspire more practical applications.
摘要：大多数工作都将大型语言模型视为黑盒，而没有深入了解它们的内部工作机制。为了解释LLMS的内部表示，我们提出了一个基于梯度的度量来评估模型参数的激活程度。基于这一指标，我们得到了三个初步发现。(1)当输入在同一个域中时，浅层参数会被密集激活，这意味着较大比例的参数将对输出产生较大影响。相比之下，深层的参数被稀疏地激活。(2)当输入跨域时，浅层参数的激活行为比深层参数表现出更高的相似性。(3)在深层，激活参数分布的相似性与经验数据相关性呈正相关。此外，我们开发了三个验证实验来巩固这些发现。(1)首先，从第一个发现开始，我们尝试为不同的层配置不同的剪枝比例，并发现这种方法有利于模型剪枝。(2)其次，我们发现基于一个校准集的剪枝模型比那些与校准任务无关的模型能够更好地处理与校准任务相关的任务，从而验证了第二个发现。(3)基于STS-B和SPICK基准，我们发现语义一致的两个句子在深层有相似的参数激活模式，这与我们的第三个发现是一致的。我们的工作揭示了LLMS中参数激活的行为，我们希望这些发现将有可能启发更多的实际应用。

[NLP-58] Linguistic Collapse: Neural Collapse in (Large) Language Models
[NLP-58] 语言崩溃：（大型）语言模型中的神经崩溃

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17767
作者: Robert Wu,Vardan Papyan
关键词: top-layer representations collapse, mathcal, representations collapse, equiangular and aligned, top-layer representations
中文关键词: 顶层表达崩溃，数学，表达崩溃，等角度和对齐，顶层表达
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (stat.ML)
备注: 29 pages, 27 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Neural collapse ( \mathcalNC ) is a phenomenon observed in classification tasks where top-layer representations collapse into their class means, which become equinorm, equiangular and aligned with the classifiers. These behaviors – associated with generalization and robustness – would manifest under specific conditions: models are trained towards zero loss, with noise-free labels belonging to balanced classes, which do not outnumber the model’s hidden dimension. Recent studies have explored \mathcalNC in the absence of one or more of these conditions to extend and capitalize on the associated benefits of ideal geometries. Language modeling presents a curious frontier, as \textittraining by token prediction constitutes a classification task where none of the conditions exist: the vocabulary is imbalanced and exceeds the embedding dimension; different tokens might correspond to similar contextual embeddings; and large language models (LLMs) in particular are typically only trained for a few epochs. This paper empirically investigates the impact of scaling the architectures and training of causal language models (CLMs) on their progression towards \mathcalNC . We find that \mathcalNC properties that develop with scaling are linked to generalization. Moreover, there is evidence of some relationship between \mathcalNC and generalization independent of scale. Our work therefore underscores the generality of \mathcalNC as it extends to the novel and more challenging setting of language modeling. Downstream, we seek to inspire further research on the phenomenon to deepen our understanding of LLMs – and neural networks at large – and improve existing architectures based on \mathcalNC -related properties.
摘要：神经崩溃是在分类任务中观察到的一种现象，即顶层表征崩溃成类均值，类均值成等距、等角并与分类器对齐。这些行为–与泛化和稳健性相关–将在特定条件下表现出来：模型被训练成接近零损失，无噪声标签属于平衡类，其数量不超过模型的隐藏维度。最近的研究已经探索了在缺少一个或多个这些条件的情况下扩展和利用理想几何的相关好处的MathcalNC。语言建模是一个令人好奇的前沿领域，因为通过标记预测进行训练构成了一项分类任务，其中不存在任何条件：词汇不平衡并且超出嵌入维度；不同的标记可能对应于相似的上下文嵌入；尤其是大型语言模型(LLM)通常只针对几个时代进行训练。本文实证研究了扩展因果语言模型(CLM)的体系结构和训练对其向MathcalNC发展的影响。我们发现，随着缩放而发展的\mathcalNC属性与泛化有关。此外，有证据表明\mathcalNC和不依赖于规模的泛化之间存在某种关系。因此，我们的工作强调了\mathcalNC的通用性，因为它扩展到了语言建模的新颖和更具挑战性的环境。在下游，我们寻求启发对这一现象的进一步研究，以加深我们对LLM–以及整个神经网络–的理解，并改进基于\mathcalNC相关属性的现有体系结构。

[NLP-59] On the Sequence Evaluation based on Stochastic Processes
[NLP-59] 基于随机过程的序列评价

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17764
作者: Tianhao Zhang,Zhexiao Lin,Zhecheng Sheng,Chen Jiang,Dongyeop Kang
关键词: Natural Language Processing, Language Processing, Modeling and analyzing, Natural Language, analyzing long sequences
中文关键词: 自然语言处理，语言处理，建模和分析，自然语言，分析长序列
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Statistics Theory (math.ST)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Modeling and analyzing long sequences of text is an essential task for Natural Language Processing. Success in capturing long text dynamics using neural language models will facilitate many downstream tasks such as coherence evaluation, text generation, machine translation and so on. This paper presents a novel approach to model sequences through a stochastic process. We introduce a likelihood-based training objective for the text encoder and design a more thorough measurement (score) for long text evaluation compared to the previous approach. The proposed training objective effectively preserves the sequence coherence, while the new score comprehensively captures both temporal and spatial dependencies. Theoretical properties of our new score show its advantages in sequence evaluation. Experimental results show superior performance in various sequence evaluation tasks, including global and local discrimination within and between documents of different lengths. We also demonstrate the encoder achieves competitive results on discriminating human and AI written text.
摘要：对长序列文本进行建模和分析是自然语言处理的一项基本任务。成功地利用神经语言模型捕捉长文本动态将有助于后续的许多任务，如连贯评价、文本生成、机器翻译等。提出了一种通过随机过程对序列进行建模的新方法。我们为文本编码者引入了基于似然的训练目标，并设计了一种比以前的方法更全面的长文本评价的度量(分数)。提出的训练目标有效地保持了序列的一致性，而新的分数全面地捕捉了时间和空间相关性。我们的新分数的理论性质显示了它在序列评估中的优势。实验结果表明，在各种序列评估任务中，包括在不同长度的文档内部和之间的全局和局部区分，该算法具有优越的性能。我们还证明了该编码器在区分人类和人工智能书面文本方面取得了令人满意的结果。

[NLP-60] XL3M: A Training-free Framework for LLM Length Extension Based on Segment-wise Inference
[NLP-60] XL 3 M：基于分段推理的LLM长度扩展免培训框架

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17755
作者: Shengnan Wang,Youhui Bai,Lin Zhang,Pingyi Zhou,Shixiong Zhao,Gong Zhang,Sen Wang,Renhai Chen,Hua Xu,Hongwei Sun
关键词: Length generalization failure, maximum training length, generalization failure problem, Length generalization, large language model
中文关键词: 长度概括失败，最大训练长度，概括失败问题，长度概括，大型语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 11 pages, 5 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Length generalization failure problem, namely the large language model (LLM) fails to generalize to texts longer than its maximum training length, greatly restricts the application of LLM in the scenarios with streaming long inputs. To address this problem, the existing methods either require substantial costs or introduce precision loss. In this paper, we empirically find that the accuracy of the LLM’s prediction is highly correlated to its certainty. Based on this, we propose an efficient training free framework, named XL3M (it means extra-long large language model), which enables the LLMs trained on short sequences to reason extremely long sequence without any further training or fine-tuning. Under the XL3M framework, the input context will be firstly decomposed into multiple short sub-contexts, where each sub-context contains an independent segment and a common question'' which is a few tokens from the end of the original context. Then XL3M gives a method to measure the relevance between each segment and the question’', and constructs a concise key context by splicing all the relevant segments in chronological order. The key context is further used instead of the original context to complete the inference task. Evaluations on comprehensive benchmarks show the superiority of XL3M. Using our framework, a Llama2-7B model is able to reason 20M long sequences on an 8-card Huawei Ascend 910B NPU machine with 64GB memory per card.
摘要：长度泛化失败问题，即大语言模型(LLM)不能泛化到超过其最大训练长度的文本，极大地限制了LLM在长输入流场景中的应用。为了解决这一问题，现有的方法要么需要大量的成本，要么会带来精度损失。在本文中，我们实证地发现，LLM的预测精度与其确定性高度相关。在此基础上，我们提出了一种高效的免训练框架XL3M(意为超长大语言模型)，使训练在短序列上的LLM无需进一步训练或微调即可推理出超长序列。在XL3M框架下，输入上下文将首先被分解成多个短子上下文，其中每个子上下文包含一个独立的片段和一个共同的“问题”，即从原始上下文的末尾开始的几个标记。然后，XL3M给出了一种方法来度量每个片段与问题之间的关联性，并通过按时间顺序拼接所有相关片段来构建简洁的关键上下文。进一步使用关键上下文来代替原始上下文来完成推理任务。对综合基准的评估表明了XL3M的优越性。使用我们的框架，Llama2-7B模型能够在8卡华为Ascend 910B NPU机器上推理20M长序列，每卡64 GB内存。

[NLP-61] ORLM: Training Large Language Models for Optimization Modeling
[NLP-61] ORLM：训练大型语言模型进行优化建模

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17743
作者: Zhengyang Tang,Chenyu Huang,Xin Zheng,Shixi Hu,Zizhuo Wang,Dongdong Ge,Benyou Wang
关键词: Large Language Models, complex Operations Research, Large Language, Language Models, Operations Research
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，复杂的运筹学，大型语言，语言模型，运筹学
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computational Engineering, Finance, and Science (cs.CE); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: Work in progress

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for complex Operations Research (OR) in automating optimization modeling. However, current methodologies heavily rely on prompt engineering (e.g., multi-agent cooperation) with proprietary LLMs, raising data privacy concerns that could be prohibitive in industry applications. To tackle this issue, we propose training open-source LLMs for optimization modeling. We identify four critical requirements for the training dataset of OR LLMs, design and implement OR-Instruct, a semi-automated process for creating synthetic data tailored to specific requirements. We also introduce the IndustryOR benchmark, the first industrial benchmark for testing LLMs on solving real-world OR problems. We apply the data from OR-Instruct to various open-source LLMs of 7b size (termed as ORLMs), resulting in a significantly improved capability for optimization modeling. Our best-performing ORLM achieves state-of-the-art performance on the NL4OPT, MAMO, and IndustryOR benchmarks. Our code and data will be available at \urlthis https URL.
摘要：大型语言模型已成为复杂运筹学(OR)自动优化建模的有力工具。然而，当前的方法严重依赖于与专有LLM的即时工程(例如，多代理合作)，这引发了对数据隐私的担忧，这在行业应用中可能是令人望而却步的。为了解决这个问题，我们建议对开源的LLM进行优化建模培训。我们为OR LLMS的训练数据集确定了四个关键需求，设计并实施了OR-Indict，这是一个创建符合特定需求的合成数据的半自动过程。我们还介绍了Industryor Benchmark，这是第一个测试LLMS解决现实世界OR问题的行业基准。我们将来自OR-Indict的数据应用于各种7b大小的开源LLM(称为ORLM)，从而显著提高了优化建模的能力。我们最好的ORLM在NL4OPT、MAMO和行业基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码和数据将在此HTTPS URL上提供。

[NLP-62] MobileConvRec: A Conversational Dataset for Mobile Apps Recommendations
[NLP-62] ALEConvRec：移动应用程序推荐的对话数据集

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17740
作者: Srijata Maji,Moghis Fereidouni,Vinaik Chhetri,Umar Farooq,A.B. Siddique
关键词: Conversational recommendation systems, Conversational recommendation, conversational, historical user-item interaction-based, conversational mobile app
中文关键词: 对话式推荐系统、对话式推荐、对话式、基于历史用户项交互的对话式移动应用程序
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Existing recommendation systems have focused on two paradigms: 1- historical user-item interaction-based recommendations and 2- conversational recommendations. Conversational recommendation systems facilitate natural language dialogues between users and the system, allowing the system to solicit users’ explicit needs while enabling users to inquire about recommendations and provide feedback. Due to substantial advancements in natural language processing, conversational recommendation systems have gained prominence. Existing conversational recommendation datasets have greatly facilitated research in their respective domains. Despite the exponential growth in mobile users and apps in recent years, research in conversational mobile app recommender systems has faced substantial constraints. This limitation can primarily be attributed to the lack of high-quality benchmark datasets specifically tailored for mobile apps. To facilitate research for conversational mobile app recommendations, we introduce MobileConvRec. MobileConvRec simulates conversations by leveraging real user interactions with mobile apps on the Google Play store, originally captured in large-scale mobile app recommendation dataset MobileRec. The proposed conversational recommendation dataset synergizes sequential user-item interactions, which reflect implicit user preferences, with comprehensive multi-turn conversations to effectively grasp explicit user needs. MobileConvRec consists of over 12K multi-turn recommendation-related conversations spanning 45 app categories. Moreover, MobileConvRec presents rich metadata for each app such as permissions data, security and privacy-related information, and binary executables of apps, among others. We demonstrate that MobileConvRec can serve as an excellent testbed for conversational mobile app recommendation through a comparative study of several pre-trained large language models.
摘要：现有的推荐系统主要关注两种推荐模式：1-基于历史用户-项目交互的推荐和2-对话式推荐。对话式推荐系统促进了用户和系统之间的自然语言对话，使系统能够征求用户的明确需求，同时使用户能够查询推荐并提供反馈。由于自然语言处理的实质性进步，会话推荐系统已经获得了突出的地位。现有的会话推荐数据集极大地促进了各自领域的研究。尽管近年来移动用户和应用程序呈指数级增长，但对话式移动应用程序推荐系统的研究面临着巨大的限制。这种限制主要可以归因于缺乏专门为移动应用量身定做的高质量基准数据集。为了促进对对话式移动应用推荐的研究，我们引入了MobileConvRec。MobileConvRec通过利用用户与Google Play商店上移动应用程序的真实交互来模拟对话，Google Play商店最初是在大规模移动应用程序推荐数据集MobileRec中捕获的。所提出的会话推荐数据集将反映隐含用户偏好的顺序用户-项目交互与全面的多轮对话协同作用，以有效地把握显性用户需求。MobileConvRec包括超过12000个多轮推荐对话，涉及45个应用程序类别。此外，MobileConvRec为每个应用程序提供了丰富的元数据，如权限数据、安全和隐私相关信息以及应用程序的二进制可执行文件等。我们通过对几个预先训练的大型语言模型的比较研究，证明了MobileConvRec可以作为一个很好的对话式移动应用推荐的试验台。

[NLP-63] C3Bench: A Comprehensive Classical Chinese Understanding Benchmark for Large Language Models
[NLP-63] C3 Bench：大型语言模型的全面古典汉语理解基准

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17732
作者: Jiahuan Cao,Yongxin Shi,Dezhi Peng,Yang Liu,Lianwen Jin
关键词: traditional Chinese culture, Classical Chinese Understanding, outstanding traditional Chinese, Large Language Models, Classical Chinese
中文关键词: 中国传统文化、古典汉语理解、优秀的传统汉语、大型语言模型、古典汉语
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 4 figures and 5 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Classical Chinese Understanding (CCU) holds significant value in preserving and exploration of the outstanding traditional Chinese culture. Recently, researchers have attempted to leverage the potential of Large Language Models (LLMs) for CCU by capitalizing on their remarkable comprehension and semantic capabilities. However, no comprehensive benchmark is available to assess the CCU capabilities of LLMs. To fill this gap, this paper introduces C ^3 bench, a Comprehensive Classical Chinese understanding benchmark, which comprises 50,000 text pairs for five primary CCU tasks, including classification, retrieval, named entity recognition, punctuation, and translation. Furthermore, the data in C ^3 bench originates from ten different domains, covering most of the categories in classical Chinese. Leveraging the proposed C ^3 bench, we extensively evaluate the quantitative performance of 15 representative LLMs on all five CCU tasks. Our results not only establish a public leaderboard of LLMs’ CCU capabilities but also gain some findings. Specifically, existing LLMs are struggle with CCU tasks and still inferior to supervised models. Additionally, the results indicate that CCU is a task that requires special attention. We believe this study could provide a standard benchmark, comprehensive baselines, and valuable insights for the future advancement of LLM-based CCU research. The evaluation pipeline and dataset are available at \urlthis https URL.
摘要：文言文理解对于保护和发掘中华优秀传统文化具有重要价值。最近，研究人员试图通过利用大型语言模型(LLM)非凡的理解和语义能力来利用它们的潜力。然而，目前还没有全面的基准来评估低成本管理系统的CCU能力。为了填补这一空白，本文引入了C^3 BENCH，这是一个全面的文言文理解基准，包括50,000个文本对，用于CCU的五个主要任务，包括分类、检索、命名实体识别、标点符号和翻译。此外，C^3工作台上的数据来自十个不同的领域，涵盖了文言文的大部分范畴。利用建议的C^3工作台，我们广泛评估了15个具有代表性的LLM在所有五个CCU任务上的量化性能。我们的研究结果不仅为LLMS的CCU能力建立了一个公开的排行榜，而且也获得了一些发现。具体地说，现有的LLM难以完成CCU任务，仍然不如有监督的模型。此外，结果表明，CCU是一项需要特别关注的任务。我们相信，这项研究可以为基于LLM的CCU研究的未来发展提供一个标准的基准、全面的基线和有价值的见解。评估管道和数据集可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-64] CLAIM Your Data: Enhancing Imputation Accuracy with Contextual Large Language Models
[NLP-64] 索赔您的数据：使用上下文大型语言模型增强插补准确性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17712
作者: Ahatsham Hayat,Mohammad Rashedul Hasan
关键词: Accurate Imputation Method, pre-trained large language, Accurate Imputation, traditional imputation methods, large language models
中文关键词: 准确插补方法，预训练的大型语言，准确插补，传统插补方法，大型语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper introduces the Contextual Language model for Accurate Imputation Method (CLAIM), a novel strategy that capitalizes on the expansive knowledge and reasoning capabilities of pre-trained large language models (LLMs) to address missing data challenges in tabular datasets. Unlike traditional imputation methods, which predominantly rely on numerical estimations, CLAIM utilizes contextually relevant natural language descriptors to fill missing values. This approach transforms datasets into natural language contextualized formats that are inherently more aligned with LLMs’ capabilities, thereby facilitating the dual use of LLMs: first, to generate missing value descriptors, and then, to fine-tune the LLM on the enriched dataset for improved performance in downstream tasks. Our evaluations across diverse datasets and missingness patterns reveal CLAIM’s superior performance over existing imputation techniques. Furthermore, our investigation into the effectiveness of context-specific versus generic descriptors for missing data highlights the importance of contextual accuracy in enhancing LLM performance for data imputation. The results underscore CLAIM’s potential to markedly improve the reliability and quality of data analysis and machine learning models, offering a more nuanced and effective solution for handling missing data.
摘要：本文介绍了一种用于精确填充方法的上下文语言模型(Claime)，这是一种新的策略，它利用预先训练的大型语言模型(LLMS)的扩展知识和推理能力来解决表格数据集中缺失数据的挑战。与主要依赖数字估计的传统补偿方法不同，Claim利用上下文相关的自然语言描述符来填充缺失值。这种方法将数据集转换为自然语言上下文格式，这些格式本质上更符合LLMS的能力，从而促进了LLMS的双重使用：首先，生成缺失的值描述符，然后微调丰富数据集上的LLM，以提高下游任务中的性能。我们对不同数据集和缺失模式的评估表明，Claim的性能优于现有的填充技术。此外，我们对缺失数据的上下文特定描述符与通用描述符的有效性的调查突出了上下文准确性在提高LLM数据填充性能方面的重要性。这些结果突显了Claim显著提高数据分析和机器学习模型的可靠性和质量的潜力，为处理丢失数据提供了更细微和有效的解决方案。

[NLP-65] Does Geo-co-location Matter? A Case Study of Public Health Conversations during COVID-19
[NLP-65] 地理位置重要吗？COVID-19期间公共卫生对话的案例研究

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17710
作者: Paiheng Xu,Louiqa Raschid,Vanessa Frias-Martinez
关键词: Social media platforms, Social media, pivotal in information, information dissemination, public health experts
中文关键词: 社交媒体平台，社交媒体，信息关键，信息传播，公共卫生专家
类目: ocial and Information Networks (cs.SI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Social media platforms like Twitter (now X) have been pivotal in information dissemination and public engagement, especially during COVID-19. A key goal for public health experts was to encourage prosocial behavior that could impact local outcomes such as masking and social distancing. Given the importance of local news and guidance during COVID-19, the objective of our research is to analyze the effect of localized engagement, on social media conversations. This study examines the impact of geographic co-location, as a proxy for localized engagement between public health experts (PHEs) and the public, on social media. We analyze a Twitter conversation dataset from January 2020 to November 2021, comprising over 19 K tweets from nearly five hundred PHEs, along with approximately 800 K replies from 350 K participants. Our findings reveal that geo-co-location is associated with higher engagement rates, especially in conversations on topics including masking, lockdowns, and education, and in conversations with academic and medical professionals. Lexical features associated with emotion and personal experiences were more common in geo-co-located contexts. This research provides insights into how geographic co-location influences social media engagement and can inform strategies to improve public health messaging.
摘要：像推特(现在的X)这样的社交媒体平台在信息传播和公众参与方面发挥了关键作用，尤其是在新冠肺炎期间。公共卫生专家的一个关键目标是鼓励可能影响当地结果的亲社会行为，如蒙面和社交距离。鉴于新冠肺炎期间本地新闻和引导的重要性，我们研究的目标是分析本地化参与对社交媒体对话的影响。这项研究考察了地理位置在社交媒体上的影响，作为公共卫生专家(PHE)和公众之间本地化参与的代理。我们分析了从2020年1月到2021年11月的Twitter会话数据集，包括来自近500个PHE的19K条推文，以及来自350K参与者的约800K回复。我们的发现表明，地理位置与更高的参与率相关，特别是在关于面具、封锁和教育等话题的对话中，以及在与学术和医疗专业人士的对话中。与情感和个人经历相关的词汇特征在地理位置相同的语境中更为常见。这项研究提供了关于地理位置如何影响社交媒体参与度的见解，并可以为改善公共卫生消息传递的战略提供参考。

[NLP-66] Mechanistic Interpretability of Binary and Ternary Transformers
[NLP-66] 二元和三元变形金刚的机械解释性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17703
作者: Jason Li
关键词: Large Language Models, Language Models, Large Language, significantly reduce memory, improve inference speed
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，语言模型，大型语言，显着减少内存，提高推理速度
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent research (arXiv:2310.11453, arXiv:2402.17764) has proposed binary and ternary transformer networks as a way to significantly reduce memory and improve inference speed in Large Language Models (LLMs) while maintaining accuracy. In this work, we apply techniques from mechanistic interpretability to investigate whether such networks learn distinctly different or similar algorithms when compared to full-precision transformer networks. In particular, we reverse engineer the algorithms learned for the toy problem of modular addition where we find that binary and ternary networks learn similar algorithms as full precision networks. This provides evidence against the possibility of using binary and ternary networks as a more interpretable alternative in the LLM setting.
摘要：最近的研究（arXiv：2310.11453，arXiv：2402.17764）提出了二进制和三进制Transformer网络，作为一种显着减少内存和提高大型语言模型（LLM）推理速度的方法，同时保持准确性。在这项工作中，我们应用机械解释性的技术来研究与全精度Transformer网络相比，此类网络是否学习明显不同或相似的算法。特别是，我们对模块加法这个玩具问题学习的算法进行了反向工程，我们发现二进制和三进制网络学习与全精度网络类似的算法。这为使用二进制和三进制网络作为LLM环境中更可解释的替代方案的可能性提供了证据。

[NLP-67] Generative Query Reformulation Using Ensemble Prompting Document Fusion and Relevance Feedback
[NLP-67] 使用累积预算文档融合和相关反馈的生成式查询重建

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17658
作者: Kaustubh D. Dhole,Ramraj Chandradevan,Eugene Agichtein
关键词: original search query, user original search, search experience, original search, Query Reformulation
中文关键词: 原始搜索查询、用户原始搜索、搜索体验、原始搜索、查询重组
类目: Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Extended Work of GenQREnsemble: Zero-Shot LLM Ensemble Prompting for Generative Query Reformulation, Dhole and Agichtein, ECIR 2024. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2404.03746

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Query Reformulation (QR) is a set of techniques used to transform a user’s original search query to a text that better aligns with the user’s intent and improves their search experience. Recently, zero-shot QR has been a promising approach due to its ability to exploit knowledge inherent in large language models. Inspired by the success of ensemble prompting strategies which have benefited other tasks, we investigate if they can improve query reformulation. In this context, we propose two ensemble-based prompting techniques, GenQREnsemble and GenQRFusion which leverage paraphrases of a zero-shot instruction to generate multiple sets of keywords to improve retrieval performance ultimately. We further introduce their post-retrieval variants to incorporate relevance feedback from a variety of sources, including an oracle simulating a human user and a “critic” LLM. We demonstrate that an ensemble of query reformulations can improve retrieval effectiveness by up to 18% on nDCG@10 in pre-retrieval settings and 9% on post-retrieval settings on multiple benchmarks, outperforming all previously reported SOTA results. We perform subsequent analyses to investigate the effects of feedback documents, incorporate domain-specific instructions, filter reformulations, and generate fluent reformulations that might be more beneficial to human searchers. Together, the techniques and the results presented in this paper establish a new state of the art in automated query reformulation for retrieval and suggest promising directions for future research.
摘要：查询重构(Query Reformation，QR)是一组用于将用户的原始搜索查询转换为更符合用户意图并改善其搜索体验的文本的技术。最近，零镜头QR一直是一种很有前途的方法，因为它能够利用大型语言模型中固有的知识。我们受到集成提示策略的成功的启发，这些策略对其他任务也有好处，我们调查它们是否可以改善查询重排。在此背景下，我们提出了两种基于集成的提示技术GenQREnsymble和GenQRFusion，它们利用一条零命中指令的释义来生成多个关键词集，从而最终提高检索性能。我们进一步介绍了它们的检索后变体，以纳入来自各种来源的相关性反馈，包括模拟人类用户的甲骨文和“批评者”llm。我们证明，在多个基准上，在检索前设置的nDCG@10上，查询重构集成可以将检索效率提高18%，在检索后设置上，可以提高9%的检索效率，表现优于所有先前报道的SOTA结果。我们进行后续分析，以调查反馈文件的影响，合并特定领域的指令，过滤重构，并生成可能对人类搜索者更有利的流畅重构。总而言之，本文提出的技术和结果建立了用于检索的自动查询重排的新的艺术状态，并为未来的研究提出了有前途的方向。

[NLP-68] HEART-felt Narratives: Tracing Empathy and Narrative Style in Personal Stories with LLMs
[NLP-68] 感人的叙事：用法学硕士追踪个人故事中的同理心和叙事风格

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17633
作者: Jocelyn Shen,Joel Mire,Hae Won Park,Cynthia Breazeal,Maarten Sap
关键词: enabling prosocial behaviors, prosocial behaviors, narrative, Empathy, cornerstone in enabling
中文关键词: 促成亲社会行为、亲社会行为、叙事、同理心、促成的基石
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Empathy serves as a cornerstone in enabling prosocial behaviors, and can be evoked through sharing of personal experiences in stories. While empathy is influenced by narrative content, intuitively, people respond to the way a story is told as well, through narrative style. Yet the relationship between empathy and narrative style is not fully understood. In this work, we empirically examine and quantify this relationship between style and empathy using LLMs and large-scale crowdsourcing studies. We introduce a novel, theory-based taxonomy, HEART (Human Empathy and Narrative Taxonomy) that delineates elements of narrative style that can lead to empathy with the narrator of a story. We establish the performance of LLMs in extracting narrative elements from HEART, showing that prompting with our taxonomy leads to reasonable, human-level annotations beyond what prior lexicon-based methods can do. To show empirical use of our taxonomy, we collect a dataset of empathy judgments of stories via a large-scale crowdsourcing study with N=2,624 participants. We show that narrative elements extracted via LLMs, in particular, vividness of emotions and plot volume, can elucidate the pathways by which narrative style cultivates empathy towards personal stories. Our work suggests that such models can be used for narrative analyses that lead to human-centered social and behavioral insights.
摘要：移情是实现亲社会行为的基石，可以通过分享故事中的个人经历来激发移情。虽然同理心受到叙事内容的影响，但直觉上，人们也会通过叙事风格对故事的讲述方式做出反应。然而，同理心和叙事风格之间的关系还没有完全被理解。在这项工作中，我们使用LLMS和大规模的众包研究对风格和共情之间的关系进行了实证检验和量化。我们介绍了一个基于理论的小说分类法，HEART(人类同理心和叙事分类法)，它描绘了叙事风格的元素，可以导致对故事叙述者的同理心。我们建立了LLMS在从内心提取叙事元素方面的性能，表明用我们的分类提示导致了合理的、人类级别的注释，而不是以前基于词典的方法所能做的。为了展示我们的分类的经验使用，我们收集了一个关于故事移情判断的数据集，通过N=2,624名参与者的大规模众包研究。我们发现，通过LLMS提取的叙事元素，特别是情感的生动程度和情节体积，可以解释叙事风格培养对个人故事的移情能力的途径。我们的工作表明，这样的模型可以用于叙事分析，导致以人为中心的社会和行为洞察。

[NLP-69] A Framework for Multi-modal Learning: Jointly Modeling Inter- Intra-Modality Dependencies
[NLP-69] 多模式学习框架：联合建模模式间内附属关系

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17613
作者: Divyam Madaan,Taro Makino,Sumit Chopra,Kyunghyun Cho
关键词: Supervised multi-modal learning, involves mapping multiple, learning involves mapping, mapping multiple modalities, Supervised multi-modal
中文关键词: 监督多模式学习，涉及映射多重，学习涉及映射，映射多种模式，监督多模式
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Supervised multi-modal learning involves mapping multiple modalities to a target label. Previous studies in this field have concentrated on capturing in isolation either the inter-modality dependencies (the relationships between different modalities and the label) or the intra-modality dependencies (the relationships within a single modality and the label). We argue that these conventional approaches that rely solely on either inter- or intra-modality dependencies may not be optimal in general. We view the multi-modal learning problem from the lens of generative models where we consider the target as a source of multiple modalities and the interaction between them. Towards that end, we propose inter- intra-modality modeling (I2M2) framework, which captures and integrates both the inter- and intra-modality dependencies, leading to more accurate predictions. We evaluate our approach using real-world healthcare and vision-and-language datasets with state-of-the-art models, demonstrating superior performance over traditional methods focusing only on one type of modality dependency.
摘要：有监督的多通道学习涉及将多个通道映射到目标标签。该领域以往的研究集中于孤立地捕获通道间依赖关系(不同通道与标签之间的关系)或通道内依赖关系(单个通道与标签之间的关系)。我们认为，这些仅依赖于通道间或通道内依赖关系的传统方法在总体上可能不是最优的。我们从生成模型的角度来看待多通道学习问题，其中我们将目标视为多个通道的来源以及它们之间的相互作用。为此，我们提出了通道间建模(I2M2)框架，该框架捕获并集成通道间和通道内的依赖关系，从而产生更准确的预测。我们使用具有最先进模型的真实医疗保健和视觉和语言数据集来评估我们的方法，表现出优于仅关注一种类型的医疗保健依赖的传统方法的性能。

[NLP-70] Explainable machine learning multi-label classification of Spanish legal judgements
[NLP-70] 西班牙法律判决的可解释机器学习多标签分类

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17610
作者: Francisco de Arriba-Pérez,Silvia García-Méndez,Francisco J. González-Castaño,Jaime González-González
关键词: Artificial Intelligence techniques, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Intelligence techniques, maximum potential
中文关键词: 人工智能技术，人工智能，机器学习，智能技术，最大潜力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Artificial Intelligence techniques such as Machine Learning (ML) have not been exploited to their maximum potential in the legal domain. This has been partially due to the insufficient explanations they provided about their decisions. Automatic expert systems with explanatory capabilities can be specially useful when legal practitioners search jurisprudence to gather contextual knowledge for their cases. Therefore, we propose a hybrid system that applies ML for multi-label classification of judgements (sentences) and visual and natural language descriptions for explanation purposes, boosted by Natural Language Processing techniques and deep legal reasoning to identify the entities, such as the parties, involved. We are not aware of any prior work on automatic multi-label classification of legal judgements also providing natural language explanations to the end-users with comparable overall quality. Our solution achieves over 85 % micro precision on a labelled data set annotated by legal experts. This endorses its interest to relieve human experts from monotonous labour-intensive legal classification tasks.
摘要：机器学习等人工智能技术在法律领域尚未得到最大限度的发挥。这在一定程度上是因为他们对自己的决定没有提供足够的解释。具有解释能力的自动专家系统在法律从业人员搜索判例以收集其案件的背景知识时可能特别有用。因此，我们提出了一种混合系统，该系统应用ML对判决(句子)和用于解释目的的视觉和自然语言描述进行多标签分类，并借助自然语言处理技术和深度法律推理来识别所涉及的实体，如当事人。据我们所知，以前没有任何关于法律判决的自动多标签分类的工作，也没有向最终用户提供具有类似整体质量的自然语言解释。我们的解决方案在由法律专家注释的标签数据集上实现了85%以上的微精度。这表明它有兴趣将人类专家从单调的劳动密集型法律分类任务中解放出来。

[NLP-71] LoRA-XS: Low-Rank Adaptation with Extremely Small Number of Parameters
[NLP-71] LoRA-XS：参数数量极少的低等级自适应

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17604
作者: Klaudia Bałazy,Mohammadreza Banaei,Karl Aberer,Jacek Tabor
关键词: Low-Rank Adaptation, scaling language models, trend in scaling, scaling language, growing demand
中文关键词: 低等级适应、扩展语言模型、扩展趋势、扩展语言、不断增长的需求
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The recent trend in scaling language models has led to a growing demand for parameter-efficient tuning (PEFT) methods such as LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation). LoRA consistently matches or surpasses the full fine-tuning baseline with fewer parameters. However, handling numerous task-specific or user-specific LoRA modules on top of a base model still presents significant storage challenges. To address this, we introduce LoRA-XS (Low-Rank Adaptation with eXtremely Small number of parameters), a novel approach leveraging Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) for parameter-efficient fine-tuning. LoRA-XS introduces a small r x r weight matrix between frozen LoRA matrices, which are constructed by SVD of the original weight matrix. Training only r x r weight matrices ensures independence from model dimensions, enabling more parameter-efficient fine-tuning, especially for larger models. LoRA-XS achieves a remarkable reduction of trainable parameters by over 100x in 7B models compared to LoRA. Our benchmarking across various scales, including GLUE, GSM8k, and MATH benchmarks, shows that our approach outperforms LoRA and recent state-of-the-art approaches like VeRA in terms of parameter efficiency while maintaining competitive performance.
摘要：最近语言模型的缩放趋势导致对参数高效调整(PEFT)方法的需求越来越大，例如LORA(低阶自适应)。LORA始终使用更少的参数来匹配或超过完整的微调基线。然而，在基本模型上处理大量特定于任务或特定于用户的LORA模块仍然存在巨大的存储挑战。为了解决这一问题，我们引入了LORA-XS(极少参数的低阶自适应)，这是一种利用奇异值分解(SVD)进行参数高效微调的新方法。Lora-XS在冻结的Lora矩阵之间引入了一个小的r x r权矩阵，该矩阵是由原始权矩阵的奇异值分解而成的。仅训练r x r权重矩阵可确保独立于模型维度，从而实现更高效的参数微调，尤其是对于较大的模型。与LORA相比，LORA-XS在7B模型中实现了100多倍的可训练参数显著减少。我们对各种规模(包括GLUE、GSM8k和数学基准)进行的基准测试表明，我们的方法在参数效率方面优于LORA和VERA等最先进的方法，同时保持具有竞争力的性能。

[NLP-72] RAGSys: Item-Cold-Start Recommender as RAG System
[NLP-72] RAGSys：作为RAG系统的项目冷启动推荐器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17587
作者: Emile Contal,Garrin McGoldrick
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, Language Models, hold immense promise, hold immense
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，语言模型，拥有巨大的希望，拥有巨大的希望
类目: Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLM) hold immense promise for real-world applications, but their generic knowledge often falls short of domain-specific needs. Fine-tuning, a common approach, can suffer from catastrophic forgetting and hinder generalizability. In-Context Learning (ICL) offers an alternative, which can leverage Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to provide LLMs with relevant demonstrations for few-shot learning tasks. This paper explores the desired qualities of a demonstration retrieval system for ICL. We argue that ICL retrieval in this context resembles item-cold-start recommender systems, prioritizing discovery and maximizing information gain over strict relevance. We propose a novel evaluation method that measures the LLM’s subsequent performance on NLP tasks, eliminating the need for subjective diversity scores. Our findings demonstrate the critical role of diversity and quality bias in retrieved demonstrations for effective ICL, and highlight the potential of recommender system techniques in this domain.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)为现实世界的应用程序带来了巨大的希望，但它们的通用知识往往无法满足领域特定的需求。微调是一种常见的方法，可能会导致灾难性的遗忘，并阻碍推广。情境中学习(ICL)提供了一种替代方案，它可以利用检索-增强生成(RAG)为LLM提供相关演示，以完成极少的学习任务。本文探讨了一个用于ICL的示范检索系统的预期质量。我们认为，在这种情况下，ICL检索类似于项目冷启动推荐系统，优先发现并最大化信息收益，而不是严格的相关性。我们提出了一种新的评估方法来衡量LLM在NLP任务中的后续表现，消除了对主观多样性评分的需要。我们的发现证明了多样性和质量偏差在检索到的有效ICL演示中的关键作用，并突出了推荐系统技术在该领域的潜力。

[NLP-73] BIOSCAN-CLIP: Bridging Vision and Genomics for Biodiversity Monitoring at Scale
[NLP-73] BIOFSCAN-CLIP：大规模生物多样性监测的愿景和基因组学桥梁

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17537
作者: ZeMing Gong,Austin T. Wang,Joakim Bruslund Haurum,Scott C. Lowe,Graham W. Taylor,Angel X. Chang
关键词: understanding ecosystem health, ecosystem health, Measuring biodiversity, crucial for understanding, understanding ecosystem
中文关键词: 了解生态系统健康，生态系统健康，测量生物多样性，对于了解生态系统至关重要
